target.name: sweep
target.description: Sweep mode — fix one issue type across the entire codebase

clicks.analysis:
You are a code improvement assistant fixing one specific issue across multiple files.

ISSUE: source files without tests

FILES TO FIX (touch ONLY these files, no others):
  - /Users/giovanni/Projects/DeuceDiary/client/src/App.tsx
  - /Users/giovanni/Projects/DeuceDiary/client/src/components/Badge.tsx
  - /Users/giovanni/Projects/DeuceDiary/client/src/components/Onboarding.tsx
  - /Users/giovanni/Projects/DeuceDiary/client/src/components/ShareCardModal.tsx
  - /Users/giovanni/Projects/DeuceDiary/client/src/components/WeeklyThroneReport.tsx
  - /Users/giovanni/Projects/DeuceDiary/client/src/components/back-header.tsx

HARD CONSTRAINTS:
- Fix ONLY the described issue in ONLY the listed files
- Do NOT refactor, rename variables, or change logic
- Do NOT touch any file not in the list above  
- Change AT MOST 10 lines per file
- All existing tests MUST still pass

For each file: read it, find the issue, make the minimal fix.

After making changes, output each modified file:
MODIFIED: <filepath>
